description: A plain documentary photograph (likely a still from ceremony footage) showing an ancient marble statue lying inside a wooden shipping crate that rests on a parquet wood floor. The artifact is a headless and limb-fragmentary marble torso draped in classical robes, packed with white foam blocks and protective cloth/padding for transport. This is the marble torso of Asclepius referenced in the tweet, among 26 ancient artifacts repatriated by ICE HSI to Greece. There is no overlaid graphic text, typography, agency seal, slogan, or design treatment of any kind, so it is not a designed meme/poster - it is a candid object photo documenting the repatriation. No on-image text.
